title: Testing
speechText: Testing. Build confidence with layered automated checks.

sections.title: Start with fast feedback
sections.body: Small unit tests make a rule executable and quick to rerun. Use them to protect decisions that can be exercised without a browser, network, or database.
sections.speechText: Start with fast feedback. Small unit tests make a rule executable and quick to rerun. Use them to protect decisions that can be exercised without a browser, network, or database.

sections.title: Test important boundaries
sections.body: Add a smaller number of integration or request-level tests where components meet. These tests verify that routing, serialization, persistence, or authentication are wired together as the user experiences them.
sections.speechText: Test important boundaries. Add a smaller number of integration or request-level tests where components meet. These tests verify that routing, serialization, persistence, or authentication are wired together as the user experiences them.

sections.title: Turn a defect into a regression test
sections.body: When a bug is understood, first write a test that demonstrates the incorrect behavior. Then make the smallest change that passes it, so the test becomes permanent evidence against the same failure.
sections.speechText: Turn a defect into a regression test. When a bug is understood, first write a test that demonstrates the incorrect behavior. Then make the smallest change that passes it, so the test becomes permanent evidence against the same failure.

questions.prompt: Which behavior is a good first unit-test target?
questions.speechText: Which behavior is a good first unit-test target? Option A, a calculation that transforms input values into a result. Option B, the color of a developer's terminal. Option C, a remote service's private database. Option D, a random production event.

options.text: A calculation that transforms input values into a result.
options.speechText: A calculation that transforms input values into a result.

options.text: The color of a developer's terminal.
options.speechText: The color of a developer's terminal.

questions.explanation: A deterministic transformation can run quickly with controlled inputs and directly describes an application rule.
questions.explanationSpeechText: A deterministic transformation can run quickly with controlled inputs and directly describes an application rule.

questions.prompt: Why keep some request-level tests when unit tests already pass?
questions.speechText: Why keep some request-level tests when unit tests already pass? Option A, they make unit tests unnecessary. Option B, they verify that important components are wired together at a real boundary. Option C, they guarantee visual design approval. Option D, they replace monitoring.

options.text: They verify that important components are wired together at a real boundary.
options.speechText: They verify that important components are wired together at a real boundary.

questions.explanation: Unit tests isolate rules; request-level tests catch integration mistakes such as a route using the wrong serializer or dependency.
questions.explanationSpeechText: Unit tests isolate rules; request-level tests catch integration mistakes such as a route using the wrong serializer or dependency.

questions.prompt: What is the strongest first step after reproducing a defect?
questions.speechText: What is the strongest first step after reproducing a defect? Option A, rewrite nearby modules. Option B, write a failing test that captures the bad behavior. Option C, remove the error message. Option D, mark the bug resolved without a change.

options.text: Write a failing test that captures the bad behavior.
options.speechText: Write a failing test that captures the bad behavior.

options.text: Mark the bug resolved without a change.
options.speechText: Mark the bug resolved without a change.

questions.explanation: A failing regression test proves the problem is represented and gives the repair a repeatable definition of success.
questions.explanationSpeechText: A failing regression test proves the problem is represented and gives the repair a repeatable definition of success.

starterAction.title: Add a focused regression test
starterAction.description: Choose one recent defect or brittle behavior, write the smallest failing test that demonstrates it, then make the smallest implementation change needed to turn it green.
starterAction.speechText: Add a focused regression test. Choose one recent defect or brittle behavior, write the smallest failing test that demonstrates it, then make the smallest implementation change needed to turn it green.
